Fix: Shut down the server with one keyboard interrupt (#94) (#8936)

Co-authored-by: lstein <111189+lstein@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: lstein <111189+lstein@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix graceful shutdown to wait for download/install worker threads (#102)

* Initial plan

* Replace os._exit(0) with ApiDependencies.shutdown() on KeyboardInterrupt

Instead of immediately force-exiting the process on CTRL+C, call
ApiDependencies.shutdown() to gracefully stop the download and install
manager services, allowing active work to complete or cancel cleanly
before the process exits.

Co-authored-by: lstein <111189+lstein@users.noreply.github.com>

* Make stop() idempotent in download and model install services

When CTRL+C is pressed, uvicorn's graceful shutdown triggers the FastAPI
lifespan which calls ApiDependencies.shutdown(), then a KeyboardInterrupt
propagates from run_until_complete() hitting the except block which tries
to call ApiDependencies.shutdown() a second time.

Change both stop() methods to return silently (instead of raising) when
the service is not running. This handles:
- Double-shutdown: lifespan already stopped the services
- Early interrupt: services were never fully started

Co-authored-by: lstein <111189+lstein@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix heap-use-after-free in icc_link_fuzzer AddXform error path

CIccXform::Create takes ownership of the CIccProfile pointer and may
free it internally. When AddXform returns icCmmStatBadXform, the profile
is already freed — calling delete again is a double-free (CWE-416).

Fix: only delete the profile on non-BadXform error codes where
CIccXform::Create was never reached.

ASAN trace: READ of size 8 at freed heap address in LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput
at icc_link_fuzzer.cpp:129 (delete pProf1 after AddXform failure).

commit.message:
fix: Windows compatibility for server auto-start and process management

- auto_server.py: _is_process_alive catches bare OSError (Windows raises
  this instead of ProcessLookupError when a process doesn't exist)
- auto_server.py: find_server_executable() now tries 'assgen-server.exe'
  before 'assgen-server' so the Windows Scripts/ dir is handled correctly
- auto_server.py: _start_local_server() uses DETACHED_PROCESS |
  CREATE_NEW_PROCESS_GROUP on Windows instead of start_new_session=True
  (start_new_session is Unix-only in subprocess.Popen)
- server/cli.py: _daemonise() now works on Windows by spawning a detached
  subprocess instead of os.fork() (os.fork does not exist on Windows)
- server/cli.py: stop/status commands catch bare OSError in addition to
  ProcessLookupError so stale PID files are cleaned up correctly on Windows

> <issue_description>### Background
> Currently, the GitHub Actions workflow (`.github/workflows/build.yml`)
publishes the Manael Docker image to GitHub Container Registry
(`ghcr.io/manaelproxy/manael`).
> However, the official documentation states that the image is published
on Docker Hub and instructs users to pull `manael/manael:latest`. This
mismatch causes confusion and potential `image not found` errors for new
users.
> 
> ### Proposal
> Update the installation documentation to point to the correct GitHub
Container Registry (GHCR).

> ### Tasks
> - Update the "Using Docker" section in
`website/content/en/docs/installation.md`.
> - Update the "Docker を使う" section in
`website/content/ja/docs/installation.md`.
> 
> ### Example Update (English)
> **From:**

commit.message:
fix: only set CdnImageBase when ThumbnailUrl is actually a CDN URL

Prevents events with old S3/non-CDN thumbnailUrls from trying to render
via CDN paths that don't have matching originals in the image bucket.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: wire task cancellation end-to-end to abort live AI session

- Add cancelProcess(processId) to QueueExecutorBridge interface (both
  coc-server and coc copies) and implement on CLITaskExecutor:
  derives taskId from processId, adds to cancelledTasks, and calls
  aiService.abortSession(sdkSessionId)
- Guard post-task updateProcess calls in CLITaskExecutor.execute() so
  completed/failed status never overwrites an already-cancelled process
- Add cancelProcess pass-through to MultiRepoQueueExecutorBridge,
  routing via workingDirectory to the correct per-repo bridge
- Wire bridge?.cancelProcess?.(id) (fire-and-forget, errors swallowed)
  into the POST /api/processes/:id/cancel HTTP endpoint
- Add tests: CLITaskExecutor.cancelProcess unit tests, terminal-status
  guard regression test, and cancel-process-api integration tests

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: grant EKS node role s3:PutObject on image bucket for presigned uploads

The API pod uses the EKS node instance profile (ticket-platform-eks-node-role)
to sign presigned PUT URLs. Without s3:PutObject on the image bucket the
browser's direct-to-S3 upload returned 403 AccessDenied, leaving the bucket
empty and the CDN returning 404.

- Add api_iam_role_name variable to infra/terraform/variables.tf
- Add aws_iam_role data source + aws_iam_role_policy in iam.tf (conditional on variable)
- Set api_iam_role_name = ticket-platform-eks-node-role in test.tfvars
- Apply the fix immediately via aws iam put-role-policy (live environment)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: add gateway quick-plans and OpenResponses spec notes

- Quick-plan: SignalR hub wiring, OpenResponses HTTP, 1:1 chat UI, #17 concurrency
- Quick-plan: shared room with agent-as-participant, @mention routing, queue mode
- Updated gateway-http-surface.md and gateway-protocol.md to reference OpenResponses spec
